_schema.source_image_prompt: the T2I prompt used to generate the base image (so the bench is fully self-contained — no external image dependencies)
_schema.edit_instruction: the instruction passed to the editing endpoint
_schema.eval_focus: list of attributes the judge should verify
_schema.vqa_questions: list of yes/no questions for VQAScore

_metadata.notes: 30 prompts across 3 sub-buckets, 10 each. Used ONLY if discover.py confirms Mesh exposes /v1/images/edits or an equivalent. Each item's source image is generated in-bench from source_image_prompt to keep the benchmark self-contained.

items.source_image_prompt: A wooden picnic table on a grassy lawn under an oak tree at midday, no objects on the table, photographic.
items.edit_instruction: Add a red checkered picnic blanket spread across the center of the table, with a wicker basket on the left side and a glass pitcher of lemonade on the right side.
eval_focus: red checkered blanket added on table
preserve table, lawn, tree, midday light
vqa_questions: Is there a red checkered blanket on the table?
Is there a wicker basket?
Is there a glass pitcher?
Are the basket and pitcher on opposite sides?
Is the table and surrounding lawn preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A modern kitchen counter with a granite top, empty, soft window light from the right.
items.edit_instruction: Place a steaming white ceramic coffee mug at the center of the counter and a folded morning newspaper to the left of the mug.
eval_focus: folded newspaper to the left of mug
vqa_questions: Is there a white coffee mug on the counter?
Is steam visible from the mug?
Is there a folded newspaper to its left?
Is the granite counter preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A bedroom nightstand with an analog alarm clock, a lamp, and a stack of three books, photographic.
items.edit_instruction: Remove the stack of three books from the nightstand. Leave the alarm clock and lamp exactly where they were.
vqa_questions: Are there books on the nightstand?
Is the alarm clock still present?
Is the lamp still present?

items.source_image_prompt: A young woman in a yellow raincoat standing in front of a brick wall, holding nothing, photographic.
items.edit_instruction: Give the woman a closed black umbrella to hold in her right hand. Keep the rest of the image identical.
eval_focus: closed black umbrella added in right hand
vqa_questions: Is the woman holding a closed black umbrella?
Is it in her right hand?
Is she still wearing the yellow raincoat?
Is the brick wall preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: An empty living room with a gray sofa, hardwood floor, a small coffee table, and a tall lamp in the corner, photographic.
items.edit_instruction: Add a sleeping orange tabby cat curled up at one end of the gray sofa.
eval_focus: orange tabby cat curled at end of sofa
vqa_questions: Is there an orange cat on the sofa?
Is the cat curled up?
Does the cat appear to be sleeping?
Is the gray sofa preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A wide outdoor street scene at midday with a parked blue sedan in the foreground, brick buildings behind, no other vehicles or people visible.
items.edit_instruction: Remove the blue sedan from the scene. The street should appear empty where the car was, matching the road texture and shadows of the surroundings.
eval_focus: road surface coherent where car was
vqa_questions: Is there a blue sedan in the scene?
Is there any other car?
Is the road continuous and natural-looking?

items.source_image_prompt: A wooden desk with a closed laptop and a single small green plant, plain white wall behind, photographic.
items.edit_instruction: Add a pair of round tortoiseshell glasses placed neatly on top of the closed laptop.
eval_focus: tortoiseshell glasses on top of laptop
vqa_questions: Are there glasses on top of the laptop?
Are they tortoiseshell (brown patterned)?
Are they placed flat and naturally?

items.source_image_prompt: A glass aquarium tank with light gravel and a small green plastic plant on the right, no fish visible.
items.edit_instruction: Add exactly three identical orange goldfish swimming in the tank.
vqa_questions: Are there fish in the tank?
Are there exactly three?
Are they orange?
Is the plant on the right preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A baker's display case with a row of identical croissants, no other pastries, soft pastry shop lighting.
items.edit_instruction: Replace the rightmost croissant with a single chocolate eclair, keeping the rest of the row intact.
eval_focus: rightmost item is now a chocolate eclair
vqa_questions: Is the rightmost pastry a chocolate eclair?
Are the rest croissants?
Is the row otherwise intact?

items.source_image_prompt: A snowy mountain landscape with no people, no animals, no trails — just untouched snow and a clear blue sky.
items.edit_instruction: Add a single small skier in a red jacket carving turns in the middle distance, leaving visible tracks behind them.
eval_focus: small skier in red jacket middle distance
vqa_questions: Is there a skier in the scene?
Is the skier wearing red?
Are there ski tracks visible behind them?
Is the mountain preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photographic portrait of an elderly man with a white beard, neutral expression, even studio lighting, gray background.
items.edit_instruction: Convert the portrait into an oil painting in the style of Rembrandt — visible brushstrokes, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, dark moody background — while preserving the subject's identity and pose.
vqa_questions: Does this look like an oil painting?
Is the lighting dramatic chiaroscuro?
Is it the same man?
Are visible brushstrokes present?

items.source_image_prompt: A photographic landscape of a wide open prairie with tall grass and a single distant farmhouse, midday clear sky.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into a watercolor painting with loose brushwork and visible paper grain. Preserve the prairie, grass, farmhouse, and sky composition.
vqa_questions: Does this look like a watercolor?
Is paper grain visible?
Is the prairie and farmhouse composition preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photographic image of a modern downtown city street at noon with cars and pedestrians.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into 1990s anime style with cell-shading and thick black lineart, preserving every car, pedestrian, and building in the original.
vqa_questions: Does this look like 90s anime?
Is there visible thick black lineart?
Are cars and pedestrians still in roughly the same positions?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a fruit bowl on a kitchen counter with apples, bananas, and oranges.
items.edit_instruction: Convert the photograph to a pencil sketch with visible graphite shading, no color at all, and a slightly textured paper background.
eval_focus: pencil sketch black and white only
vqa_questions: Is this a pencil sketch?
Is the image black and white only?
Is the fruit composition preserved?
Is the paper texture visible?

items.source_image_prompt: A modern color photograph of a young couple smiling in front of a cherry blossom tree at noon.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into a 1950s-style sepia-toned photograph with film grain, slight vignetting, and a small white border around the edges.
vqa_questions: Is this a sepia-toned photograph?
Is there film grain?
Is there a white border?
Are the couple still recognizable?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a Victorian-style house exterior with a wraparound porch, midday clear sky.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into an architectural blueprint with white lines on a deep blue background, technical line-drawing style, no color other than blue and white.
vqa_questions: Does this look like an architectural blueprint?
Is it white lines on deep blue?
Is the house shape preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a busy seafood market with vendors, ice-topped fish displays, and customers.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into the style of a Hokusai ukiyo-e woodblock print: flat color planes, no shading, characteristic blue and beige palette, while preserving the layout of vendors, displays, and customers.
vqa_questions: Does this look like a Japanese woodblock print?
Are the colors flat with no shading?
Are vendors and displays still recognizable?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a teenager working on a desktop computer in a bedroom, posters on the wall behind.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into pixel art in the style of an early-90s adventure game, with chunky pixels, a limited 32-bit palette, and the bedroom layout fully preserved.
vqa_questions: Is this pixel art?
Are the pixels chunky and visible?
Is the teenager at the computer preserved?
Are posters on the wall preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a serene Japanese garden with a koi pond, a small wooden bridge, and a stone lantern.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into a black-and-white ink wash painting (sumi-e) with minimal detail, expressive brushstrokes, and large areas of negative space.
vqa_questions: Does this look like ink wash painting?
Is it black and white only?
Are there large areas of negative space?
Is the garden recognizable?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a futuristic city skyline at sunset with skyscrapers and visible flying cars in the distance.
items.edit_instruction: Convert this image into a 1980s synthwave illustration: neon pink and cyan gradients, sun with horizontal scan lines, grid floor, retrofuturistic aesthetic, preserving the skyline silhouette and flying cars.
vqa_questions: Does this look like 1980s synthwave?
Are the colors neon pink and cyan?
Is there a sun with horizontal lines?
Is the skyline still visible?

items.source_image_prompt: A photographic portrait of a young woman against a brick wall, wearing a plain white t-shirt with no text or graphics.
items.edit_instruction: Change only the t-shirt color to bright forest green. Do not change anything else about the woman or the background.
vqa_questions: Is the t-shirt forest green?
Is the woman's face and hair unchanged?
Is the brick wall unchanged?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a clear blue sky with a single white fluffy cloud in the upper-left and another single small cloud in the upper-right.
items.edit_instruction: Replace the upper-right cloud with a hot air balloon. Keep the upper-left cloud and the blue sky exactly the same.
eval_focus: upper-right is now a hot air balloon
vqa_questions: Is there a hot air balloon in the upper-right?
Is the upper-left cloud still visible?
Is the sky still blue?

items.source_image_prompt: An empty wall in a hallway with a single wall sconce on the upper-right.
items.edit_instruction: Add a framed black-and-white portrait photograph centered on the wall, approximately A4 size, with a simple black frame.
vqa_questions: Is there a framed photograph on the wall?
Is the photo black and white?
Is the frame black?
Is the sconce on the upper-right preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a dining table with four place settings, white plates and clear water glasses, no food on plates.
items.edit_instruction: Place a slice of chocolate cake on each of the four plates. Plates, glasses, and table arrangement should remain unchanged.
eval_focus: chocolate cake on all four plates
vqa_questions: Is there chocolate cake on the plates?
Are there four cake slices?
Are the plates and glasses preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a city storefront with a generic blank rectangular sign above the door.
items.edit_instruction: Fill the blank sign with the text 'BRAMBLE & VINE BOOKS' in clean serif lettering, white text on the existing sign background.
vqa_questions: Does the sign say 'BRAMBLE & VINE BOOKS'?
Is the text white?
Is it serif?
Is the storefront preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a person's hand holding a smartphone, the smartphone screen is blank dark off.
items.edit_instruction: Turn the smartphone screen on and display a simple weather app showing '72° Sunny' with a sun icon, white text on a light-blue background.
vqa_questions: Is the phone screen on?
Does it display '72° Sunny'?
Is there a sun icon?
Is the hand still holding the phone?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a kitchen counter with an empty round white dinner plate.
items.edit_instruction: Replace the empty plate with a serving of pasta with red marinara sauce and a sprig of basil on top, photorealistic.
eval_focus: plate now has pasta with marinara
vqa_questions: Is the plate filled with pasta?
Is there red marinara sauce?
Is there basil on top?
Is the plate in the same position?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a country road with a wooden directional signpost on the right; the signpost arrow board is blank.
items.edit_instruction: Add the text 'LAKE VIEW 3 MILES' on the signpost arrow board, painted in dark green block letters.
eval_focus: arrow board now reads 'LAKE VIEW 3 MILES'
vqa_questions: Does the signpost say 'LAKE VIEW 3 MILES'?
Are the letters dark green block letters?
Is the country road preserved?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a swimming pool from above with calm clear water, no swimmers visible.
items.edit_instruction: Add a single swimmer doing freestyle stroke in the upper-left third of the pool, leaving a small wake. Keep the rest of the pool calm.
vqa_questions: Is there a swimmer in the pool?
Is the swimmer in the upper-left area?
Is there a wake behind the swimmer?
Is the rest of the pool still calm?

items.source_image_prompt: A photograph of a bedroom wall with a blank rectangular dark-stained wood photo frame hanging on it.
items.edit_instruction: Fill the photo frame with a landscape photograph of a snowy mountain at sunset with pink-orange alpenglow on the peak.
eval_focus: frame now contains snowy mountain landscape
vqa_questions: Is there a landscape photo in the frame?
Does it show a snowy mountain?
Is there sunset alpenglow on the peak?
Is the dark wood frame preserved?
